L1.head: integration of dielectric gradient metamaterials with advanced 3D printing techniques
L1.tail: precise control over the refractive index distribution
L1.claim: 集成技术使得精确控制折射率分布成为可能

L1.head: precise control over the refractive index distribution
L1.claim: 精确控制优化了超表面的材料属性以减少色差和球面像差

L1.head: optimized material properties
L1.claim: 优化后的材料属性减少了色差和球面像差

L1.head: mitigated chromatic and spherical aberrations
L1.tail: imaging beyond the traditional diffraction limit
L1.claim: 减少的像差允许超越传统衍射极限的成像

L2.head: design of dielectric gradient metamaterials
L2.tail: spatially controlled variation of the refractive index
L2.claim: 设计使得折射率的空间受控变化成为可能

L2.head: spatially controlled variation of the refractive index
L2.claim: 折射率的空间受控变化抵消了波长依赖的相移

L2.head: counteracted wavelength-dependent phase shifts
L2.claim: 抵消的相移促进了消色差超分辨率成像

L2.head: precision of 3D printing technology
L2.tail: fabrication of complex geometries of THz metalenses with high fidelity
L2.claim: 3D打印的精度使得高保真制造复杂几何结构的THz金属透镜成为可能

L2.head: utilization of advanced printing techniques
L2.tail: deposition of high aspect ratio nanostructures
L2.claim: 利用先进打印技术允许沉积高纵横比纳米结构

L2.head: fabrication of complex geometries with high aspect ratio nanostructures
L2.tail: desired phase distribution for super-resolution imaging
L2.claim: 制造复杂几何结构实现了超分辨率成像所需的相位分布

L3.head: combination of dielectric gradient metamaterial design principles with 3D printing methods
L3.claim: 结合设计原理和3D打印方法开发协同方法

L3.head: synergistic approach
L3.claim: 协同方法优化了相位和折射率分布

L3.head: synergistic approach
L3.tail: iterative testing with lens design modifications based on imaging feedback
L3.claim: 协同方法涉及基于成像反馈的迭代测试修改设计

L3.head: iterative testing and design modifications
L3.tail: realization of THz lens surpassing Abbe diffraction limit
L3.claim: 迭代测试和修改设计导致实现超越阿贝衍射极限的THz透镜

L3.head: collaboration between high aspect ratio nanostructures and metasurface technology
L3.tail: more efficient light manipulation and collection
L3.claim: 协作使得更高效的光操控和收集成为可能

L3.head: efficient light manipulation and collection
L3.tail: numerical aperture of THz lenses to 0.555 and field of view to 90°
L3.claim: 高效的光操控提高了数值孔径至0.555并扩展视场至90°
